flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Yavapai College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $2.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Yavapai College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Yavapai College rose 16% between 2009 and 2010 (12.2% → 14.1%).
